auth.name: Full Name
auth.tagline: Craft your body. Master your form.
auth.googleComingSoon: Google sign-in will be available in a future version
auth.appleComingSoon: Apple sign-in will be available in a future version
auth.resetPasswordHint: We'll send a reset link to your email

onboarding.subtitle1: Use ready programs or build your own
onboarding.subtitle2: Weight, reps, rest — with one tap
onboarding.subtitle3: Charts and PRs to keep you motivated
onboarding.nameHelper: We'll use this name on the home screen and reports.
onboarding.nameRequired: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).

dashboard.restDaySubtitle: Let your body recover. Tomorrow you'll be stronger.
dashboard.noActiveProgramHint: Pick a program, schedule it across your week, and we'll handle the tracking.

exercises.title: Exercise Library
exercises.noResultsDesc: Try a different search term or muscle filter.
exercises.translationPending: Turkish description not yet available for this exercise. Showing English.
exercises.autoTranslatedHint: This description was auto-translated by AI. May contain errors.

programs.title: Programs
programs.noProgramsDesc: Pick a preset program or build one of your own.
programs.descriptionPlaceholder: Why did you pick this program? (optional)
programs.nameRequired: Please give your program a name.
programs.atLeastOneExercise: Add at least 1 day and 1 exercise.
programs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this program?
programs.scheduleSubtitle: Which days of the week will you train?
programs.scheduleHint: This program requires training {{count}} days per week.
programs.deactivateConfirm: Are you sure you want to drop this program?

workout.abandonConfirm: Are you sure you want to abandon this workout?
workout.restNextSet: Get ready for the next set

measurements.title: Body Measurements
measurements.noMeasurementsCta: Log your first measurement to start tracking

reports.title: Reports
reports.muscleDistributionHint: How your working sets are distributed across muscle groups in the last {{days}} days.
reports.consistencyHint: Last 12 weeks · Filled cell = workout completed
reports.exerciseTrendHint: Pick an exercise — your weekly estimated 1RM trend
reports.prRecentHint: PR set in the last 30 days
reports.noWorkoutsDesc: Pick a program or log a quick session — your stats will start showing up here.
reports.anomalyHint: Your recent measurements show an inconsistent jump. Want to verify your entries?
reports.needMoreMeasurements: Need more data (at least 2 entries, 3+ days apart)
reports.noActiveGoal: Set a goal in your profile
reports.summaryNoActivity: No workouts yet this week. Get one in!
reports.bmiHint: Classification based on your height and weight
reports.bmiNoData: Add height & weight to calculate BMI
reports.waistHeightNoData: Log a waist measurement to see this
reports.targetWeightWrongDirection: You're moving away from your target
reports.targetWeightNotEnough: Need more measurements for a forecast

insights.title: Smart insights
insights.needMoreData: Complete a few more workouts and insights will appear here.
insights.missedFrequencyMsg: You did {{done}}/{{target}} workouts this week. {{remaining}} day(s) left.
insights.muscleGapMsg: Only {{pct}}% of your working sets target {{muscle}} in the last 4 weeks. Add an isolation movement.
insights.muscleOverMsg: {{pct}}% of your sets hit {{muscle}}. Balance the rest of your week.
insights.staleLiftMsg: Your estimated 1RM hasn't moved in {{weeks}} weeks. Try a rep range change or a deload week.
insights.bulkStallMsg: Your weight changed by {{kg}} kg in the last {{weeks}} weeks. Re-check your calorie surplus.
insights.cutBellyGainMsg: While cutting, your waist grew +{{cm}} cm in the last {{weeks}} weeks. Hold the deficit.
insights.cutTooFastMsg: You lost {{kg}} kg in 2 weeks. Over 1 kg/week risks muscle loss.
insights.bulkTooFastMsg: You gained {{kg}} kg in 2 weeks. Above 0.5 kg/week tends to add fat.
insights.weight1RMDeclineMsg: Total volume dropped {{pct}}% in your last 3 sessions. Check sleep, food, stress.
insights.inactiveDaysMsg: Try a short full-body session to ease back in.
insights.newPRsMsg: You hit a personal record on {{count}} exercise(s) in the last 30 days. Nice!
insights.consistencyDropMsg: Your weekly average went from {{prev}} to {{curr}}. Get back into rhythm.
insights.longSessionMsg: Recent workouts average {{minutes}} min. Over 75 min often hurts focus.
insights.shortSessionMsg: Recent workouts average {{minutes}} min. Consider adding sets or exercises.
insights.legSkipMsg: Almost no leg sets in the last {{weeks}} weeks. Add Squat / Deadlift / RDL.
insights.noProgramMsg: Pick a program and schedule it to unlock personalized insights.
insights.warmupRatioLowMsg: Most of your workouts skip warmups. They cut injury risk.
insights.restTooShortMsg: You rest {{seconds}} sec on average. 90-180 sec is ideal for compounds.
insights.volumeJumpMsg: Volume jumped {{pct}}% over last week. Watch out for overreaching.

profile.title: Profile
profile.targetWeightHelper: See estimated time to goal in the Body tab
profile.targetWeightInvalid: Please enter a value between 30-300 kg
profile.emailNotVerifiedDesc: Check your inbox or request a new link.
profile.verificationFailed: Couldn't send the email, please try again later

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.firebaseNotConfigured: Firebase not configured. Fill in your .env file.
